description: An aerial photograph captures an active aggregate extraction and processing facility situated on the shores of a large, turquoise-coloured quarry lake. The central industrial area, largely composed of light-grey sand and gravel, features extensive infrastructure including multiple conveyor belt systems and processing machinery. Several large stockpiles of granular material are visible, with one prominent conical pile and numerous smaller, irregularly shaped mounds. A long, grey jetty or bridge extends across the lake from the processing plant towards the opposite shore, where a two-lane road with a vehicle is visible in the upper background. Surrounding the industrial area are varied land cover types: lush green agricultural fields in the foreground and background, patches of trees and dense shrubbery along the lake's edge and bordering fields, and scattered residential buildings with red roofs in the distance. A rectangular green area, possibly a sports field, is visible on the right side of the image. On the lower right, a yard area contains construction equipment, including a crane and several containers. The water body itself displays a distinctive light turquoise colour, characteristic of quarry lakes or gravel pit lakes.
